title: Lesson-Learned Entry
description: Turn a failure into a system improvement (Design Principle #8; Day 4/5 failure->golden-set). A lesson is incomplete until it names the concrete change that prevents recurrence.

signal_missed.description: What observable signal would have caught it earlier?

system_improvement.description: The durable fix. At least one sub-field must be non-empty.

test_or_check.description: Ideally a line added to scripts/check.sh or a new objective.

becomes_eval_case.description: Day 4/5: was this added to the golden set / objective registry?
